creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jason E. Hale from comment #1)
> This should be fixed in version 1.7.3.  Can you confirm?

Yes, this appears to be fixed.  I was able to build the port with either the
AVAHI or MDNSRESPONDER option, as well as with both options disabled.  The Makefile does not permit both options to be selected at the same time.

Thanks!
